channel.title: GitHub PowerShell Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of PowerShell in GitHub

item.title: cisagov/ScubaGear
item.description: Automation to assess the state of your M365 tenant against CISA's baselines

item.title: Azure/Microsoft-Defender-for-Cloud
item.description: Welcome to the Microsoft Defender for Cloud community repository

item.title: Gerenios/AADInternals
item.description: AADInternals PowerShell module for administering Azure AD and Office 365

item.title: ItzLevvie/MicrosoftTeams-msinternal
item.description: This project was created from PowerShell which allows people to download the latest internal build of Microsoft Teams.

item.title: Romanitho/Winget-AutoUpdate
item.description: WAU daily updates apps as system and notify connected users. (Allowlist and Blocklist support)

item.title: microsoft/winget-pkgs
item.description: The Microsoft community Windows Package Manager manifest repository

item.title: Micke-K/IntuneManagement
item.description: Copy, export, import, delete, document and compare policies and profiles in Intune and Azure with PowerShell script and WPF UI. Import ADMX files and registry settings with ADMX ingestion. View and edit PowerShell script.

item.title: microsoft/azure_arc
item.description: Automated Azure Arc, Edge, and Platform environments

item.title: SpotX-Official/SpotX
item.description: SpotX patcher used for patching the desktop version of Spotify

item.title: ScoopInstaller/Versions
item.description: 📦 A Scoop bucket for alternative versions of apps.
